name: @oneworks/plugin-warm-cowork-theme
description: An optional warm, card-oriented collaboration theme for OneWorks.

descriptionI18n.en: Ivory grid surfaces, roomy cards, coral actions, and blue progress semantics for collaborative work.
descriptionI18n.zh-Hans: 象牙白网格、宽松卡片、珊瑚色操作与蓝色进度语义组成的协作工作台主题。
